title: helichrysum edwardsii
intro: Helichrysum edwardsii, also known as Yellow Bush, is a shrubby perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to South Africa. The plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum edwardsii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum edwardsii include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
